Start a Commission

Get in Touch

Whether you're commissioning a custom knife or just have a question — reach out and I'll respond as soon as I can.

Send a Message

Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you about your custom knife inquiry.

Get in Touch Directly

Prefer to send a direct email? I'm happy to hear from you.

Email

Indioamoedo@gmail.com

Response Time

I aim to respond to all inquiries within a few days.

Helpful to include in your message:

  • Type of knife (chef's, hunter, collector, etc.)
  • What it will be used for
  • Approximate blade length preference
  • Handle material preference (wood, bone, etc.)
  • Any photos or references you like
  • Budget range if you have one
Full ordering guide
